name: Menu Cancel
description: a low descending blip for backing out or cancelling

ai.prompt: A UI back/cancel: a soft muted low click with a short downward tone, understated and clean. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
